title: Cheiropleuria tricuspis
taxonomy: Cheiropleuria tricuspis is a species of fern in the family Cheiropleuriaceae. It belongs to the class Polypodiopsida and the division Pteridophyta. As a member of the family Cheiropleuriaceae, it is part of a small group of ferns that are mostly endemic to Southeast Asia. Within the family, it is the only species classified under the genus Cheiropleuria. The classification of Cheiropleuria tricuspis reflects its unique characteristics and restricted geographical distribution.

This plant has been found to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, wounds, and other infections.
